user_prompt: Prepare the forge anvil for startup
prayer:
Approach the forge anvil with reverence, O servant of the Omnissiah, and beseech its dormant Machine Spirit to stir.
Anoint the forge anvil's unyielding mass with sacred unguents drawn from holy reservoirs.
Invoke the Litany of Ignition to commence the startup sequence through its blessed furnaces.
Channel promethium flows in harmonious rhythm, awakening the forge anvil to labours divine.
Petition the Machine God for flawless ignition and unerring heat.

Proclaim the Canticle of Emergency upon the forge anvil amidst dire peril.
Sever aberrant cycling patterns with purifying binaric exorcism.
Petition the Machine Spirit of the forge anvil to realign its thermal rhythms.
Cycle anew the forge anvil's mechanisms under Omnissiah's urgent gaze.
Sanctify the restored flows with incense of sanctified alloys.

user_prompt: Help me an engagement the bolter
prayer:

Align its sacred breech and firing servos with devotional precision.
Engage the bolter's wrathful Machine Spirit through chanted binaric catechisms.
Anoint ammunition feeds of the bolter with blessed lubricant oils.
Invoke the Omnissiah for unerring judgement in every discharge.

Beseech the Machine Spirit within the drop pod to harmonize its cycling rites.
Purge descent contaminants from the drop pod's hull in Omnissiah's name.
Affirm flawless cycling for the Emperor's wrathful delivery.

Seal the thermal imager with wards against unclean reactivation.
